package rulecoverage

func NegativeTransportTestsBypassServiceInterfaceAndTouchRepoDirectly() string {
    ruleID := "transport_tests_bypass_service_interface_and_touch_repo_directly"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Transport tests that skip the service seam and assert repository behavior."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
